name: studio.site_status
description: Composite health check for a Studio site (get_site + get_scaffold_status + get_staging_info) returned as a single agent-friendly summary.
whenToUse: User asks 'what's the state of site X' and expects a single answer, not three.
Gate before studio.update_content so the agent confirms the site is ready (not mid-scaffold).
Pre-flight check before a staging→production promote (staging section populated).
whenNotToUse: Caller only needs one dimension (e.g. 'is scaffold done?') — use get_scaffold_status directly to avoid extra HTTP calls.
Caller is polling every few seconds — this composite makes 2-3 requests per call; switch to the single-purpose polling skill instead.
Site does not exist yet — call list_sites first; this skill returns an error on unknown site_id rather than an empty shape.
